title: Human voice and Reality/Evidence Gate
summary: Forge Method now starts new work with a warmer guide voice and challenges ideas before treating them as viable.
highlights: Empty and brownfield work now opens with human guidance before technical state details.
Guide/preflight JSON includes compact human_experience and reality_evidence_gate payloads.
Reality/Evidence Gate blocks impossible, cruel, unsafe, or incoherent ideas before market claims.
New market, domain, and technical feasibility scan workflows support discovery.
